[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00110010 3
1 10011100 4
2 10110011 5
3 11110110 6
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00000000 a
7 01010000 2

01 10 01000000 1
12 21 01000000 1
23 32 01100000 2
34 43 00100000 1
45 54 00010000 1
56 65 10010000 2
67 76 10110010 4
70 07 01010000 2 match 7

13 31 01001000 2
24 42 00100000 1
35 53 10001000 2
46 64 00110010 3 match 0
57 75 10010100 3
60 06 00010000 1
71 17 01000010 2

14 41 00000010 1
25 52 00000000 a match 4 5 6
36 63 10100000 2
47 74 00110010 3 match 0
50 05 00010000 1
61 16 00000010 1
72 27 01100000 2

04 40 00010000 1
15 51 00001000 1
26 62 00100001 2
37 73 11100000 3
